## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hotel Engine and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and explore new opportunities in Reddit community management.](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics show positive trends despite recent Google tracking changes affecting impression data](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Expense and financial management content cluster continues to perform well, highlighting an opportunity for further development](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Reddit community management explored as a potential tactic for organic growth and brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [AI-powered research tools (Perplexity, Claude) are revolutionizing content ideation and topic research processes](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Updates

  - [Recent drop in impressions attributed to Google's changes in tracking, discounting bot traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Positive trends: positions up 58%, presence up 39% over last 60 days](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Expense and financial management cluster saw increased sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Growth observed in travel trends, market intelligence, and technology/software solutions content areas](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Content Strategy and Opportunities

  - [Identified need to update a high-performing 2021 article about Hotel Engine to reflect current branding and offerings](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Exploring collaboration with Barry (contractor) for enhanced content features like calculators](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Discussed potential for corporate card-related content, pending PM approval](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Reddit Community Management

  - [Explored as a tactic for organic growth and brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Kyle presented AI-driven research on relevant subreddits and common questions for construction industry persona](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Discussed balance between white hat and gray hat tactics, with preference for transparent, authentic engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### AI-Powered Research Tools

  - [Demonstrated use of Perplexity for efficient topic research and content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [Compared capabilities of different AI models (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Introduced EXA as a potential game-changer for deep research, currently being integrated into GrowthX workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)

### Upcoming Projects and Challenges

  - [Hotel Engine working on a time-sensitive homepage project for Dreamforce](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [Positioning debates and tight deadlines creating challenges for the team](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to review and assess the outdated 2021 Hotel Engine article for potential updates](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

  - [Carrie to send new content for review either later today or early tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)

  - [Carrie to follow up with Margo (PM) about sharing corporate card information for content development](https://fathom.video/share/ef8rAsBQoE_vUNdZc7GAes32LaZkECDm?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
